more.description: Government Raises Alarm Over Fake Overseas Jobs Luring Citizens Into War Zones The government has issued a strong warning to Zimbabweans over dangerous recruitment schemes that are luring citizens into foreign conflict zones under false pretences. Authorities say the scams, often disguised as legitimate job offers, have already resulted in multiple deaths and widespread exploitation. more.title: ZACC arrests ZANU PF MP for blowing ZWG1.2 million Constituency Development Fund on beer, groceries, hotel bookings
more.description: The Zimbabwe Anti-Corruption Commission (ZACC) has arrested ZANU PF legislator Joel Sithole over allegations of misappropriating ZWG1.2 million from the Constituency Development Fund (CDF). Sithole, a Chiredzi South MP, reportedly received ZWG1,234,150.00 from Parliament in August 2025 to fund constituency development projects. These included the construction of a classroom block and the roofing of staff [...] The post ZACC arrests ZANU PF MP for blowing ZWG1.2 million Constituency Development Fund on beer, groceries, hotel bookings appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
